title: oenocarpus regius
intro: Oenocarpus regius, also known as the Cupuacu Tree, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, characterized by its large, yellow or red fruit and edible pulp. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Oenocarpus regius include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against diseases and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the pulp and seeds of the fruit are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
